# Teach Me

> Curated, in-depth frontend lessons for developers and designers.

## Site

- URL: https://teachmeskills.dev
- Author: Chris
- Format: Static HTML, no frameworks

## Courses

### SVG - From Coordinates to Animation

A 13-lesson course covering SVG from first principles through to complex animation.

Lessons:
1. The Coordinate System - viewport, viewBox, preserveAspectRatio, user vs viewport units
2. Transforms and Grouping - translate, rotate, scale, skew, the g element, nested coordinate systems
3. Basic Shapes and Paths - rect, circle, ellipse, line, polyline, polygon, path d attribute, Bezier curves
4. Styling: Presentation Attributes vs CSS - cascade specificity, inline styles, external CSS, inheritance in SVG
5. Gradients, Patterns, and Paint Servers - linearGradient, radialGradient, pattern, objectBoundingBox vs userSpaceOnUse
6. Clipping and Masking - clipPath, mask, luminance vs alpha masking
7. Filters - filter primitives pipeline, feGaussianBlur, feColorMatrix, feComposite, filter regions
8. Text and TextPath - text positioning model, tspan, textPath, baseline alignment, text on curves
9. SMIL Animation Fundamentals - animate, animateTransform, set, timing model, from/to/values, calcMode
10. SMIL Advanced - animateMotion, motion paths, syncbase timing, event-based triggers, additive animation
11. CSS Animation of SVG - animatable properties, keyframes on SVG elements, transform-origin differences
12. JavaScript and SVG - DOM manipulation, createElementNS, event handling, programmatic animation
13. Putting It Together - capstone combining coordinate systems, animation, interactivity

Reference:
- SVG Elements and Attributes - comprehensive reference of all SVG elements and their attributes
- SVG DOM Methods - JavaScript API reference for SVG manipulation
